overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in winter clothing walking through a heavy snowstorm in a mountainous wilderness. The character follows a snowy trail beside a river, passing through snow-covered pine forests and eventually descending to a waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail alongside a river

events.description: wind gusts blow snow across the trail reducing visibility momentarily

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snow-covered trail beside a partially frozen river, leaving deep footprints

entered.detail: deep snow path with visible footprints trailing behind the character
partially frozen river with snow-covered banks and dark water visible
tall evergreen trees heavy with accumulated snow on branches
snow-covered rocky outcrops rising across the river
small stone structure or cabin ruin visible through the falling snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered mountain trail during a heavy snowstorm. A partially frozen river flows to the right, bordered by snow-laden pine trees on the left. In the distance, a small stone ruin appears through the fog as the character passes by.

events.description: trail opens into wider snow field with waterfall becoming visible through the mist ahead
character begins descending a gentle slope toward the river level

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow toward a distant waterfall, navigating around scattered snow-covered trees

entered.detail: large waterfall visible through the snow mist with water cascading down rocks
large rocks covered in thick snow along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into a wide snow field as the character continues forward. A waterfall becomes visible through the heavy snowfall in the distance. The character begins descending a slope toward the river, passing large snow-covered boulders while the pine trees recede into the background.

events.description: character descends from snow trail to rocky riverbank at water level
character stops at waterfall base and looks up at the cascading water

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the snowy slope to the river rocks and approaching the waterfall base through mist and spray

entered.detail: dark wet rocks at the river's edge with patches of snow and ice
spray and mist rising from the waterfall base creating a hazy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The character descends to the river level, walking carefully across snow-dusted rocks toward the waterfall. The sound of cascading water grows louder as mist fills the air. The character stops at the base of the falls, surrounded by wet boulders and rising spray, completing the journey from the mountain trail to the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a heavy mountain snowstorm that gradually descends from a forested trail to the base of a waterfall. It begins with the character walking along a snowy path beside a partially frozen river, passing snow-laden pine trees and a distant stone ruin obscured by fog. As the character continues forward, the landscape opens into a wide snow field where the pine trees recede and a waterfall emerges through the falling snow. The scene then shifts as the character descends a slope past large snow-covered boulders, moving closer to the river level. Finally, the camera follows the character across snow-dusted rocks into a mist-filled air, coming to a stop at the base of the falls amidst wet boulders and rising spray.
